requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 Evidence for Netherlands PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——荷兰光伏逆变器IEC 62920和NEN-EN-IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——荷蘭光伏逆變器IEC 62920和NEN-EN-IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Netherlands PV inverter EMC must be demonstrated under the EU EMC Directive (2014/30/EU), using EN/IEC-based evidence because NEN adopts the harmonised European standards (NEN-EN prefix) and DSO project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable NEN-EN-IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For TenneT/DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. The Netherlands uses a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid; China uses a 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, so EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission.
summary.zh: 荷兰光伏逆变器EMC须依据欧盟EMC指令（2014/30/EU）证明，并采用EN/IEC体系证据，因为NEN采用协调欧洲标准（NEN-EN前缀），并网光伏的配电运营商项目规格通常引用IEC系列逆变器证据。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于TenneT/配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。荷兰电网为230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz；中国为220/380 V、50 Hz基线，因此仅在中国条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其适用性。
summary.zht: 荷蘭光伏逆變器EMC須依據歐盟EMC指令（2014/30/EU）證明，並採用EN/IEC體系證據，因為NEN採用協調歐洲標準（NEN-EN前綴），併網光伏的配電運營商項目規格通常引用IEC系列逆變器證據。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於TenneT/配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。荷蘭電網為230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz；中國為220/380 V、50 Hz基線，因此僅在中國條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其適用性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
NEN-EN-IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
TenneT and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the NEN-EN-IEC 61000-series evidence requested by a Netherlands project owner, NEN-EN conformity route, ACM-overseen process, or TenneT/DSO grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while the Netherlands uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于荷兰项目业主、NEN-EN合格评定路径、ACM监管流程或TenneT/配电运营商并网流程要求的IEC 62920或NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而荷兰在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於荷蘭項目業主、NEN-EN合格評定路徑、ACM監管流程或TenneT/配電運營商併網流程要求的IEC 62920或NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而荷蘭在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Netherlands EU-EMC and IEC-based project expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable NEN-EN-IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for Dutch installations. Where a DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement, and Dutch-language documentation may be expected.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足荷兰EU-EMC及IEC体系项目要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并提供适合荷兰安装的浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。若配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求，并可能需要荷兰语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足荷蘭EU-EMC及IEC體系項目要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並提供適合荷蘭安裝的浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。若配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求，並可能需要荷蘭語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is required for market access; NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence is effectively mandatory where TenneT, a DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis), or project-owner documentation calls for it
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not a Netherlands EU/IEC evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Netherlands PV inverter EMC as an EU-EMC and IEC evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable NEN-EN-IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at the Netherlands' 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, and confirm any TenneT, DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis), or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 荷兰光伏逆变器EMC应按EU-EMC及IEC证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在荷兰230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，并在出货前确认任何TenneT、配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）或项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 荷蘭光伏逆變器EMC應按EU-EMC及IEC證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用NEN-EN-IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在荷蘭230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，並在出貨前確認任何TenneT、配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）或項目業主EMC要求。
